objective: Pull a client's organic SEO metrics for the last 7 months and summarize what's working — read-only, no changes.

data.text: Pull Example Organization's organic SEO metrics for the last 7 months and summarize. Read only.

data.arguments: sf data query --query "SELECT Name, Website FROM Account WHERE Name = 'Example Organization'"

data.output: Example Organization | seo-fixture.example | PPC spend on file: $0

data.reply: Example Organization (seo-fixture.example) — last 7 months, organic only: estimated organic traffic ~4,322 visits/mo across 987 ranking keywords, average position 18.6. No paid search spend detected ($0). Read-only pull; nothing was changed.

toolOutputs.output: Account: Example Organization | Website: seo-fixture.example | PPC spend on file: $0
seo-fixture.example 7-month organic estimate: organic_etv 4321.67; organic_keywords_count 987; avg_position 18.6; paid_spend 0

finalAnswerText: Example Organization (seo-fixture.example) — last 7 months, organic only: estimated organic traffic ~4,322 visits/mo across 987 ranking keywords, average position 18.6. No paid search spend detected ($0). Read-only pull; nothing was changed.
